nasb.text: But if you show partiality, you are committing sin and are convicted by the law as transgressors.

esv.text: But if you show partiality, you are committing sin and are convicted by the law as transgressors.

cnv.text: 如果你們憑外貌待人，就是犯罪，律法就要裁定你們是犯法的。

ccb.text: 如果你们偏待人，嫌贫爱富，便是犯罪，律法要将你们定罪。

csbs.text: 但如果你们偏待人，就是犯罪，并被律法指证是违犯律法的人。
